stonetop.summary: A 400-pound snapping-turtle drake that buries itself and waits.

system.concept: A 400-pound snapping-turtle drake that buries itself and waits.
system.description: Like a snapping turtle, but six feet long and four hundred pounds, with big badger-like claws — and way faster than you think. It digs itself under a layer of soil and waits long enough for the gwead to start growing over it. Then, when something comes near? SNAP! An intact shell is worth quite a bit (immobile, Value 2), but good luck killing one without cracking it.
